description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page
AND Non-Live Featured content is in the Games carousel
AND the user is Entitled to the Non-Live Featured content

*NOTE: Non-Live Featured Content = SVOD, VOD*

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Non-Live Featured Content in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<content_title>, <content_description>, Press select to play. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
